title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 0–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Kaido as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A super climax! Versing Kaido in the Wano arc & the 25th anniversary Caravan Truck project!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I WAS SURE YOU WERE A GONER AFTER THAT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since you're able to make your surroundings robbery...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It should be safe to say you awakened your Paramecia fruit,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But something about this feels off..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Transformation like this is more typical of a Zoaw fruit!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 19 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
